name: Peach Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sliced fresh peaches, or canned, well drained
recipeInstructions: Reserve half a cup of flour to dredge the peaches. Combine the remaining one and a half cups flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon; mix well and set aside. Combine the eggs, sugar, and oil, beating until smooth. Add the flour mixture. Beat at low speed until blended - the batter will be thick. Dredge the peaches and nuts in the reserved flour and gently fold into the batter. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13x9 inch pan. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean. Allow to cool completely. Drizzle with confectioner's sugar glaze or serve with a dollop of whipped cream.
